title: Signaling Compression (SigComp) - Extended Operations
abstract:
This document describes how to implement certain mechanisms in
SigComp (Signaling Compression), RFC XXX, which can significantly
improve the compression efficiency compared to using simple per-
message compression.
SigComp uses a UDVM (Universal Decompressor Virtual Machine) for
decompression, and the mechanisms described in this document are
possible to implement using the UDVM instructions defined in RFC XXX.
